about.title: Hi, I'm Ahmadjon.
about.body_1: I'm a Senior Frontend Engineer based in Jizzakh, Uzbekistan. I've spent the last six years working with companies in the US, UK, and Eastern Europe — Pearson, EPAM, Codemotion Ninjas — building products at scale.
about.body_2: I care about software that loads fast, holds up under load, and stays kind to the people who maintain it after me. When I'm not shipping product code, I'm tinkering with my own tools — Mon Français and DevPrep, both linked above.
about.currently: Currently open to senior frontend roles, remote — globally.

items.summary: React and Next.js for enterprise e-commerce serving 20,000+ concurrent users. BigCommerce storefronts. Direct stakeholder collaboration on requirements and estimations.
Frontend systems for FinTech and logistics startups. Scalable UI architecture in React, Vue, and TypeScript. Translated complex design requirements into performant solutions.
React + TypeScript on high-traffic enterprise platforms. 10,000+ concurrent users, 2TB+ CDN, 1,000+ marketing campaigns. Mentored juniors and ran technical interviews.
Full-stack apps in React, Node, Express, MongoDB. REST APIs, real-time tracking, third-party integrations, performance optimization.
React + TypeScript UI. Role-based authorization, autopay, KYC systems serving 20,000+ simultaneous users.

testimonials.title: What people I've worked with say.

items.name: Lead Designer

items.quote: Every single project is done in a timely fashion and delivered exactly as outlined. We absolutely offer our highest possible recommendation.

french.title: Mon Français — French Grammar & Learning
french.hero_title: French grammar, vocab, and dialogues — in one place.
french.hero_subtitle: 63+ grammar topics, 500+ vocabulary words from Vite et Bien, real-life dialogues with cultural notes, and an AI tutor that explains anything you paste.

panel_descriptions.grammar: Browse and search 63+ grammar topics with full conjugations, examples, and tips.
panel_descriptions.top_words: The most-frequent French words by category — verbs, adjectives, nouns, and more — with translations and example sentences.
panel_descriptions.tenses: All the French tenses with formulas, when to use them, and example conjugations.
panel_descriptions.conjugator: Type any French verb and see it conjugated across every tense — present, past, future, conditional, subjunctive, and imperative.
panel_descriptions.vocab: Browse vocabulary by Vite et Bien unit. Search across French and English.
panel_descriptions.speaking: 20 thematic units with authentic dialogues, expressions, and cultural notes.
panel_descriptions.quiz: Test yourself on the top words — multiple-choice, 10 questions per round, your best score is saved.
panel_descriptions.ai: Paste any French text and get an AI-powered summary, translation, or grammar breakdown.

grammar_panel.no_results: No grammar topics match your filters.

vocab_panel.no_results: No vocabulary units match your search.

speaking_panel.no_results: No speaking units match your search.

top_words_panel.title: Top words
top_words_panel.subtitle: Most-frequent French words by category, with translations and example sentences.

quiz_panel.title: Vocabulary quiz
quiz_panel.subtitle: 10 multiple-choice questions per round. Pick a category and a direction to start.
quiz_panel.mode_fr_to_x: See a French word, choose its meaning.
quiz_panel.mode_x_to_fr: See a meaning, choose the French word.

tenses_panel.title: All the tenses
tenses_panel.subtitle: Formulas, when to use them, and a sample conjugation for each. Tap any tense to expand.
tenses_panel.jump_to_conjugator: Conjugate any verb in this tense

conjugator_panel.title: Verb conjugator
conjugator_panel.subtitle: Type a French verb in its infinitive form to see it conjugated across every tense.
conjugator_panel.not_found_hint: Make sure you typed the infinitive form, e.g. "aller" not "allé". The conjugator covers most standard French verbs.

ai_panel.title: AI text assistant
ai_panel.body: Paste any French text — dialogue, article, exercise — and get an instant English explanation.
ai_panel.mode_label: What should I do with the text?
ai_panel.extra_placeholder: e.g. focus on subjunctive usage, or explain for A2 level…
ai_panel.api_notice: Add your Anthropic API key first.

cv.summary_body: Senior Frontend Engineer with 6+ years building scalable, high-performance web applications for enterprise and product companies including Pearson and EPAM. Specialized in React, Next.js, and TypeScript with experience supporting platforms serving 10,000–20,000+ concurrent users.
